name: Cymbal Desk smoke suite
description: Minimal routing + tool-use checks for the multi-agent system. Run with: adk eval customer_desk eval/smoke.evalset.json

parts.text: How many days do I have to return an item I bought?
You can return most items within 30 days of delivery; Cymbal Plus members get 60 days.
What's the status of order ORD-78003?
Order ORD-78003 is currently IN_TRANSIT, last scanned at Pune Hub, promised by 2026-07-03.
